burden.dalyPerCapita: low population burden; sudden cardiac death risk in young
burden.mortalityRate: Low overall; higher in high-risk subsets

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Unexplained LV wall thickness on echocardiography or MRI; family history and genetic testing support

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; limited access to MRI/genetics and ICDs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo access in urban centers; MRI/genetics limited
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Beta-blockers, calcium channel blockers, ICD for high-risk; septal reduction in select centers
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underdiagnosis and limited advanced care access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing cardiology centers and increasing awareness
